profiles.about: Dynamic and detail-oriented Full Stack Developer with over 5+ years of experience in software development, specializing in building scalable web applications using modern technologies. Proficient in both front-end and back-end development, with a strong foundation in Angular, Node.js, and Express. Adept at collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions that meet client needs. Committed to continuous learning and staying updated with industry trends.

education.description: Gained a strong foundation in Relational Database Management Systems (RDBMS) with a focus on SQL. Developed core competencies in web development technologies, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Node.js. Worked on academic projects that reinforced hands-on learning and real-world application of web development principles.

bullets: Developed and maintained web applications using Angular for front-end and Node.js for back-end, enhancing user experience and application performance.
Collaborated with product managers and designers to define project requirements and deliver solutions that align with business objectives.
Implemented RESTful APIs and integrated third-party services, improving application functionality and user engagement.
Conducted code reviews and provided mentorship to junior developers, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and knowledge sharing.
Assisted in the development of web applications, focusing on front-end features using Angular and back-end services with Node.js.
Participated in the full software development lifecycle, from requirements gathering to deployment and maintenance.
Contributed to database design and management using SQL and Sequelize ORM, ensuring data integrity and performance optimization.

projects.name: SpinEv (B2B / EV Domain)
projects.techStack: Angular, Node.js, Express, Sequelize ORM, MySQL
projects.description: A B2B web platform developed for Exicom, which supplies EV charging stations to partners like Indian Oil. The system manages station policies, charger locations, charging guns, and pricing structures.
projects.impact: Improved operational efficiency and centralized management of EV infrastructure for partner companies.

projects.name: Telemed (Medical Domain)
projects.description: An Indian government project currently active in Telangana. Patients visit PHC studios, register their symptoms, and consult doctors through live video sessions. Doctors can provide prescriptions digitally.
projects.impact: Increased access to healthcare in rural areas and reduced the need for physical consultations.

projects.name: myKaarma (Automobile Domain)
projects.description: A USA-based solution for car dealerships to provide service scheduling links to customers. Users can register their vehicles and book services online.
projects.impact: Enhanced user engagement and simplified vehicle service scheduling for customers.

projects.name: HRM (Human Resource Management System)
projects.description: An internal web application for managing employee data, attendance, project allocation, leave records, and salary slips.
projects.impact: Streamlined HR operations, resulting in efficient employee management and reduced manual work.

projects.name: blocEdu (Educational Domain)
projects.description: A web-based educational platform supporting three user roles – student, teacher, and admin. Teachers can upload and manage courses, students can browse and purchase courses, and admins oversee platform operations.
projects.impact: Enabled seamless course creation and purchase flow, improving accessibility to digital education content.

skills.Others: Cloudinary, Docker, Sequelize ORM, Bootstrap, Angular Material

bullets: Ensuring accurate data entry and efficient processing of information

projects.description: Developed a responsive website replicating key aspects of the youtube user interface, demonstrating proficiency in front-end development.

profiles.about: Results-driven Backend Engineer with 1.6+ years of experience in designing and developing scalable systems using ASP.NET Core and Microservices Architecture. Proven expertise in building secure REST APIs, implementing JWT-based authentication and authorization, and optimizing data storage using SQL Server. Skilled in utilizing Agile methodologies, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and leveraging tools like Git, Docker, and Swagger to deliver high-quality software solutions. Proficient in programming languages such as C#, Java, and JavaScript, with a strong understanding of frameworks, databases, and caching mechanisms including Angular, React, PostgreSQL, Redis, and SQL Server.

education.institution: J.C. Bose University of Science and Technology, YMCA
Gov. Model Sr. Sec. School, Uncha Gaon
